name: Broccoli and Bits-o-Barley Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except soup and cheese in a small saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat. Remove from heat, cover, and let stand for 2-3 minutes.
3. Add the cream of broccoli soup (undiluted) and shredded Monterey Jack cheese.
4. Stir until well combined.
5. Transfer mixture to a baking dish and bake at 350°F (175°C) for 20-30 minutes or until heated through.
Suggestion: For added flavor, sauté onions, bell peppers, celery, or your choice of spices before combining with the other ingredients.
